'''Reboam''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]] which was noted for being a small world with a harsh climate that was relatively uninhabited and was comparable to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

According to the claims of [[Ta'a Chume]], [[Ni'Korish|her mother]] once granted refugee of a group of up to fifty [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to settle on Reboam. There they formed a Jedi Praxeum by the ancient ruins of the world which ran for a year until [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and his dark knights came to [[Hapan]] space to hunt down the Jedi where they uncovered the academy. The group were all reportedly slain and [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader was said to have sealed their remains in the ruins. However, this was later revealed by [[Isolder]] to have been a lie as Ta'a Chume only said the story in order to distract [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

{{Planet-stub}}
